title: Minneapolis Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Minneapolis with a Z-Score of -3.86. The event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Minneapolis are extremely cold, with a significant impact on the city's infrastructure. The high Z-Score indicates a rare and extreme weather event. 
 The heating degree days (HDD) have reached 14.5 GG, while the cooling degree days (CDD) are at 0.0 GG, highlighting the intensity of the cold snap. 
 The relative humidity is at 68%, and the wind speed is moderate at 10.2 km/h, exacerbating the cold conditions.
conclusion: Implement emergency measures to mitigate the effects of the cold snap immediately.
